titleStmt.title: SII 39.165: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 165. (A.R. No. 165 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARĀGHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE••••••••••• TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAGAṆḌA [GŌPĀLA] DĒVA-4TH YEAR.

summary.p: The inscription refers to the gift of 33 cattle to the temple of Tirupputkuḻi nāyaṉār by Kāḍavaṉ maṉaikaḻiyāmēśvara Nāyakkaṉ, a native of Malaimaṇḍalam. The above gift was entrusted with the shepherd of Kāvēripākkam to supply probably necessary ghee for burning lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī virakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭ
ṭu tiruppati tiruppuṉkkuḻi nāyanārkku malaimaṇṭalattuk kāṭavaṉ maṉaikaḻiyāmeśvara nāyakkaṉ vaitta tirunaṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku pālpacu pattum ciṉaipacu pattum polimaṟai nāku paṉṉiraṇṭum ṛṣabham Oṉṟum Āka 3 10 3 muppattu muṉṟum kai
kkoṇṭa kāvirippākkattu Iṭaiyaril
Digital edition of SII 39.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
